ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transformers" (
  "transformer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transformer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name or description of the transformer */,
  "shift_degree" INTEGER /* Degree shift of the transformer */,
  "vector_group" TEXT /* Vector group configuration */,
  "vn_hv_kv" INTEGER /* High voltage rating in kV */,
  "pfe_kw" REAL /* No-load loss in kilowatts */,
  "i0_percent" REAL /* No-load current percentage */,
  "vn_lv_kv" INTEGER /* Low voltage rating in kV */,
  "sn_mva" REAL /* Rated power in MVA */,
  "tap_step_degree" INTEGER /* Step degree of the tap changer */,
  "tap_neutral" REAL /* Neutral tap position */,
  "tap_min" REAL /* Minimum tap position */,
  "vkr_percent" REAL /* Short-circuit impedance percentage */,
  "tap_step_percent" REAL /* Tap step percentage */,
  "tap_side" TEXT /* Side of the tap changer */,
  "tap_phase_shifter" INTEGER /* Indicates if it is a phase shifter */,
  "tap_max" INTEGER /* Maximum tap position */,
  "vk_percent" REAL /* Voltage regulation percentage */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the transformer */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the transformer was installed */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "insulation_class" TEXT /* Class of insulation used in the transformer */,
  "cooling_type" TEXT /* Type of cooling system used */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the transformer */,
  "warranty_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the warranty for the transformer expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transformer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log entry */,
  "transformer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transformer being serviced */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost incurred for the maintenance */,
  "performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is scheduled */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_transformer_id FOREIGN KEY ("transformer_id") REFERENCES transformers ("transformer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "transformer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transformer being monitored */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance metric was recorded */,
  "output_voltage_kv" REAL /* Output voltage in kilovolts */,
  "current_magnitude_a" REAL /* Current magnitude in amperes */,
  "temperature_c" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "input_voltage_kv" REAL /* Input voltage in kilovolts */,
  "power_factor" REAL /* Power factor of the transformer */,
  "load_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the rated load */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of the transformer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_transformer_id FOREIGN KEY ("transformer_id") REFERENCES transformers ("transformer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, technician, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the supplier */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "primary_contact" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the supplier record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supplier_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the relationship */,
  "transformer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transformer supplied */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "date_supplied" TEXT /* Date when the transformer was supplied */,
  "purchase_order_number" TEXT /* Purchase order number for the transformer */,
  "warranty_period" INTEGER /* Warranty period provided by the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supplier_relationships_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supplier_relationships_transformer_id FOREIGN KEY ("transformer_id") REFERENCES transformers ("transformer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration record */,
  "transformer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transformer */,
  "configuration_details" TEXT /* Details about the configuration settings */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the configuration */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_transformer_id FOREIGN KEY ("transformer_id") REFERENCES transformers ("transformer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "project_manager" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the project was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_transformers" (
  "project_transformer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the relationship */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "transformer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transformer used in the project */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of transformers used in the project */,
  "allocated_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the transformers in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_transformer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_transformers_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_transformers_transformer_id FOREIGN KEY ("transformer_id") REFERENCES transformers ("transformer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "transformer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transformer associated with the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "message" TEXT /* Alert message describing the issue */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_transformer_id FOREIGN KEY ("transformer_id") REFERENCES transformers ("transformer_id")
)
